label: 人类在环
description: Generate a draft, pause after the first agent for human feedback, then let a second agent revise the final answer.

request.name: request
request.description: The task that should be drafted first.
request.value: 请给 GraphiteUI 写一段简短的欢迎介绍。

draft_answer.name: draft_answer
draft_answer.description: Initial answer generated before human review.

human_feedback.name: human_feedback
human_feedback.description: Human guidance applied while the run is paused.
human_feedback.value: 请让语气更适合新用户，并强调可视化编排能力。

final_answer.name: final_answer
final_answer.description: Final answer revised from the draft and human feedback.

config.value: 请给 GraphiteUI 写一段简短的欢迎介绍。

draft_writer.name: draft_writer
draft_writer.description: Create the first draft, then pause after this node so a human can review it.

config.taskInstruction: 读取 request，用中文生成一版简短欢迎介绍草稿。只输出正文，不要解释。

output_draft_answer.name: output_draft_answer
output_draft_answer.description: Preview the draft shown at the human review pause.

input_human_feedback.name: input_human_feedback
input_human_feedback.description: Edit this feedback while the graph is paused, then resume.

config.value: 请让语气更适合新用户，并强调可视化编排能力。

revision_writer.name: revision_writer
revision_writer.description: Revise the draft according to the human feedback.

config.taskInstruction: 读取 draft_answer 和 human_feedback，根据人工反馈改写草稿，输出最终中文回复。只输出正文，不要解释。

output_final_answer.name: output_final_answer
output_final_answer.description: Preview the final answer after human review.
